title: TopBuild Corp Analyst Ratings and 2026 Earnings Expectations
text:
TopBuild Corp. Analyst Consensus and Forward Earnings Outlook:

Analyst Consensus Rating:
TopBuild Corp. has been given a consensus recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by the sixteen brokerages covering the firm. Another assessment reports that the 11 analysts covering TopBuild stock have a consensus rating of "Buy" and an average price target of $460.82, which forecasts a 10.56% increase in the stock price over the next year.

Earnings Estimates:
Wall Street expects TopBuild's full-year EPS of $18.92, though this represents a 1.2% contraction from prior year. Sell-side analysts expect revenue to grow 8.3% over the next 12 months, indicating moderate optimism on the top-line despite EPS pressure.

Price Targets:
Benchmark reduced its fiscal 2026 earnings per share estimate to $18.50 from $21.75, reflecting caution on residential market conditions. The consensus 12-month price target stands at $460.82, implying modest upside from current levels.

Valuation Context:
The current P/E of 21.3x compares unfavorably with the industry average at 12.4x, which points to valuation risk if investor sentiment cools given macro uncertainties.
